---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, a new agent, or a data vendor
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do, and what's missing today?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like. For new agents/vendors/pipeline
stages, sketch how it would fit into the existing graph.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Links, papers, screenshots, or examples.
